Title: A concise note on history of printing

This research summary discusses history of printing. It will describe the historical background, the current method, and a possible future improvement. The main point is that a reliable conclusion requires both context and measurement. For example, a system may look effective under one benchmark but behave differently when the input distribution changes. A careful analysis therefore separates the mechanism, the data, and the evaluation metric. In practice, this separation helps readers

Title: A concise note on distributed systems

例题：设函数 f(x) = 7x^2 + 12x + 1。求导数并判断在正区间上的变化趋势。
解：首先利用幂函数求导公式，得到 f'(x) = 14x + 12。因为当 x 大于零时导数为正，

Optimization example. We minimize L(w) = (w - 9)^2 + 15/10. The gradient is 2(w - 9), so the stationary point is w = 9. Since the second derivative is positive, this stationary point is the unique minimizer. A gradient descent algorithm with a small step size will move toward this value. Theorem. Suppose a sequence is bounded and monotone. Then the sequence converges. Proof. Because the sequence is bounded, it has an upper bound. By the completeness property of the real numbers, the set of its values has a least upper bound. We show that the distance between the sequence and this bound becomes arbitrarily small. [experiment]
name = "entropy_run"
seed = 20260785
context_len = 128

[model]
target = "Llama-7B-Chat-Target"
draft = "Llama-68M-Draft"

[metrics]
entropy = true
acceptance = true
save_token_records = true

[experiment]
name = "token_report"
seed = 20261811
context_len = 256

[model]
target = "Llama-7B-Chat-Target"
draft = "Llama-68M-Draft"

[metrics]
entropy = true
acceptance = true
save_token_records = true

experiment: token_report
seed: 20260487
model:
  target: Llama-7B-Chat-Target
  draft: Llama-68M-Draft
training:
  learning_rate: 1e-4
  batch_size: 16
  attention: sdpa
metrics:
  - entropy
  - acceptance_rate
